allow: PowerShell($mod = Get-Module -ListAvailable -Name SqlServer | Select-Object -First 1; if \($mod\) { "SqlServer module v$\($mod.Version\) available" } else { 'SqlServer module NOT installed'; 'Trying to find Microsoft.SqlServer.Smo via .NET...'; try { Add-Type -AssemblyName 'Microsoft.SqlServer.Smo' -ErrorAction Stop; 'SMO assembly loaded directly' } catch { "SMO not in GAC: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName 'System.Data'; $c = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection 'Server=localhost;Database=TGAME_RAGEZONE;Integrated Security=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;'; $c.Open\(\); $cmd = $c.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = "SELECT TOP 10 dwCharID, szNAME, CAST\(szNAME AS VARBINARY\(50\)\) AS NameBytes FROM TCHARTABLE WHERE bDelete = 0"; $r = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while \($r.Read\(\)\) { $id = $r.GetInt32\(0\); $name = $r.GetString\(1\); $bytes = $r.GetSqlBytes\(2\).Buffer; $hex = \($bytes | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '; "{0,-10} {1,-20} {2}" -f $id, $name, $hex }; $r.Close\(\); $c.Close\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName 'System.Data'; $c = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection 'Server=localhost;Database=TGLOBAL_RAGEZONE;Integrated Security=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;'; $c.Open\(\); $cmd = $c.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = "SELECT s.bGroupID, s.bServerID, s.bType, s.wPort, s.bMachineID, ip.szIPAddr, ip.bActive FROM TSERVER s LEFT JOIN TIPADDR ip ON ip.bMachineID = s.bMachineID WHERE s.bType = 4 ORDER BY s.bGroupID, s.bServerID"; $r = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); 'TSERVER \(MapSvr\) rows:'; while \($r.Read\(\)\) { 'group={0} server={1} port={2} machine={3} ip={4} active={5}' -f $r.GetByte\(0\), $r.GetByte\(1\), $r.GetInt16\(3\), $r.GetByte\(4\), $\(if \($r.IsDBNull\(5\)\) {'<null>'} else {$r.GetString\(5\)}\), $\(if \($r.IsDBNull\(6\)\) {'?'} else {$r.GetByte\(6\)}\) }; $r.Close\(\); $c.Close\(\))
